rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MAGILAVY FAMILY TRUST ESTABLISHED JUNE 5, 1989 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: The motion is granted. Respondent did not file a timely opposition, did not timely seek a protective order, and did not respond to the request for admissions. Therefore, the fact is deemed admitted, and the documents are deemed genuine (without making any determination concerning their relevance or admissibility). Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $174. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, February 7, 2017.
